description_long: This is a robust, double-headed axe featuring a large, black, textured metal blade on one side and a pointed spike on the opposite side. The blade is asymmetrical, with one side forming a broad, angular cutting edge and the other tapering into a sharp, elongated point, suggesting both chopping and piercing capabilities. The handle is cylindrical, metallic, and reinforced with two prominent collars near the head and base, providing structural strength and a secure grip. A section of the handle is wrapped in a brown material, likely leather or fabric, to enhance grip comfort and control. The overall construction appears heavy-duty, suitable for demanding tasks or as a display piece in an urban garage or workshop. The surface of the blade is rough and slightly reflective, while the handle has a matte, industrial finish.
description: A heavy, double-headed axe with a black, textured blade and a reinforced metal handle, featuring a brown grip wrap and a pointed spike opposite the blade.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the narrow edge, showing the cylindrical handle and the thickness of the blade and spike.
description_view_1: The broad side of the axe reveals the full blade profile, with its angular cutting edge and pointed spike, as well as the brown grip wrap on the handle.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow edge view highlights the symmetry of the handle and the alignment of the blade and spike.
description_view_3: The other broad side of the axe displays the blade's rough texture and the reinforced collars on the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical metal handle with two reinforced collars and a brown leather or fabric grip wrap; straight, robust, and industrial in style.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed with one broad, angular cutting edge and an opposite pointed spike; rough, blackened finish with no decorative elements.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and collared mounting with visible reinforcement at the head-handle junction.
